title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Bear Grylls ventures into a remote Bornean archipelago, navigating through dense jungle to find vital resources for survival.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Bear will have to skin and disembowel a camel in an attempt to stay alive as he wonders if he will learn to deal with the hardships and the disgusting taste of the camel.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Bear drops from a bi-plane into the Chihuahuan Desert in West Texas, where he withstands extreme heat, navigates deep gorges and dodges deadly diamondbacks.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: In the vastness of the Sahara desert and the terrifying beauty of towering sand dunes, Bear Grylls tackles extreme survival challenges as he consumes one of the world's deadliest scorpions to survive.

subTitle: Deep in the heart of Vietnam, Bear Grylls encounters rocky terrain and faces deadly creatures as he journeys along a river.

subTitle: Police investigating the murder search for the taxi driver called Tongo. Realizing he is a wanted man, Tongo turns himself in and reveals a shocking story that alters the course of the investigation.

title: Orphan
subTitle: After losing their baby, a couple adopt a nine-year-old girl. However, they soon make a troubling discovery about her mysterious past and uncover several traits of her disturbing personality.
